This '''[[subterine]]''' was operated by the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] '''[[Vonya]]''' around [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]]. Starting as a space freighter, it was captured by the Nightsisters of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] and modified for underground travel. They used it in an attempt to penetrate the [[Star Chamber (Star Temple)|Star Chamber]] beneath one of the [[Star Temple]]s, which housed the [[Infinity Gate]].

{{Ship-stub}}
